styles: .business-text { padding: 0; margin: 0; height: 100%; } .sbc-unit-card { height: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 14px; font-family: 'Segoe UI', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif; color: #0F172A; } .sbc-unit-card__header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px; min-height: 28px; } .sbc-unit-card__title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: #0F172A; letter-spacing: 0.01em; } .sbc-unit-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: flex-end; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: #94A3B8; } .sbc-unit-card__state { color: #94A3B8; white-space: nowrap; } .sbc-unit-card__grade { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 42px; height: 26px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 999px; background: #F1F5F9; color: #475569; font-weight: 700; } .sbc-unit-card__arrow { color: #94A3B8; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1; } .sbc-metric-card { border-radius: 18px; background: rgba(239, 246, 255, 0.92); border: 1px solid #BFDBFE; padding: 18px 18px 16px; box-sizing: border-box; } .sbc-metric-card__head { display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; } .sbc-metric-card__title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: #334155; } .sbc-metric-card__score { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: #475569; white-space: nowrap; } .sbc-metric-card__row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 14px; min-height: 34px; } .sbc-metric-card__label { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: #64748B; } .sbc-metric-card__value { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #0F172A; text-align: right; } .sbc-unit-card--loading .sbc-unit-card__grade { background: #E2E8F0; color: #94A3B8; }
